word: H7932 - שְׁכַן - shᵉkan - shek-an' - Cause to dwell

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁכן

Transliteration: shekan

Phonetic: shek-an'

BDB Definition:

  1. to dwell, reside
    1. (Peal) to dwell
    2. (Pael) to cause to dwell

Origin: corresponding to H7931

TWOT entry: 3031

Part(s) of speech: Verb
